metadata.title: Převodník TIFF na WebP – TIFF WebP

steps.name: Add TIFF files
steps.text: Drag TIFF files onto the drop zone or click to select.

steps.text: Download files individually or all at once.

items.title: 1. Pridat soubory
items.description: Drag TIFF files or click to select.

items.title: 3. Stahnout
items.description: Download individually or all at once.

items.title: Privacy
items.description: Files stay on your device. Nothing is uploaded.

items.title: No limits
items.description: Convert as many files as you need.

items.title: Quality control
items.description: Adjust WebP quality with the slider.

items.title: Bulk download
items.description: Download all files with one click.

items.question: TIFF → WebP?
items.answer: Prevedte soubory TIFF na lehke WebP. Masivni snizeni velikosti se zachovanim kvality.

items.question: Server upload?
items.answer: No. Everything runs locally in your browser. Files never leave your device.

items.question: Multiple files?
items.answer: Yes. Add as many files as you like. No limits.

contentBlocks.title: Pomozte nam vylepsit nastroje
contentBlocks.description: Mate napad, nasli jste chybu nebo chcete navrhnout funkci? Napiste nam, odpovidame do 24 hodin.
